creator: hselasky@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

To get the latest 12-stable you need to use GIT:

git clone https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src.git
cd freebsd*
git checkout freebsd/stable/12

To update sources:

git pull --rebase


Is it possible to explain the xfer-cancel issue a bit more? Like is it some issue with the XHCI hardware, or is it entirely a software problem?

When a transfer is complete or cancelled, the pepext->xfer pointer is NULL'ed. If you change that you may end up with situations where it tries to access a NULL td pointer.

I have a comment regarding the port power patch. This would be nice to have upstream, but it should be controlled by a sysctl, because sometimes users want to charge connected devices after shutdown.

--HPS
